THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ACME DESIGN GROUP, A PARTNERSHIP GARDNER, LAMONT RAIMOND, MORGAN MALLOY $400.83 PRINCIPAL, $28.99 INTEREST, $59.32 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $489.14, FURTHER ORDERED THAT THE CROSS-COMPLAINANTS TAKE NOTHING BY WAY OF THEIR CROSS-COMPLAINT AND THE CROSS-COMPLAINT IS DISMISSED.
